name: enhance_default
prompt: Enhance this low-light image by lifting exposure and recovering visible details while preserving identity, geometry, atmosphere, natural colors, and avoiding halos, noise, over-sharpening, or overexposure.

name: relight_daylight
prompt: Relight this low-light image into clean neutral daylight while preserving identity, geometry, materials, camera viewpoint, and scene composition. Keep the result natural and realistic.

name: relight_warm_indoor
prompt: Relight this low-light image into warm indoor ambient lighting while preserving identity, geometry, materials, camera viewpoint, and scene composition. Keep the result natural and realistic.

name: relight_soft_cinematic
prompt: Relight this low-light image into soft cinematic evening lighting while preserving identity, geometry, materials, camera viewpoint, and scene composition. Keep the result natural and realistic.
